hard.name: hard_001_rolling_7d_conversion_revenue
hard.sql: SELECT user_id, conversion_date, ROUND(SUM(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY conversion_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS rolling_7d_revenue FROM conversions ORDER BY user_id, conversion_date; -- hard_001

hard.name: hard_002_first_touch_channel_revenue_window
hard.sql: WITH ranked_sessions AS (SELECT user_id, channel, session_ts, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY session_ts) AS rn FROM sessions), user_revenue AS (SELECT user_id, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM conversions GROUP BY user_id) SELECT rs.channel, COUNT(*) AS users, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(ur.rev, 0)), 2) AS total_revenue FROM ranked_sessions rs LEFT JOIN user_revenue ur ON rs.user_id = ur.user_id WHERE rs.rn = 1 GROUP BY rs.channel ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, rs.channel ASC; -- hard_002

hard.name: hard_003_duplicate_subscription_users_dense_rank
hard.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT user_id, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY subscription_id) AS rk FROM subscriptions) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS c FROM d WHERE rk > 1; -- hard_003

hard.name: hard_004_category_order_value_percentile
hard.sql: WITH order_totals AS (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS order_total FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id), cat_orders AS (SELECT oi.category, o.order_id, ot.order_total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN order_totals ot ON o.order_id = ot.order_id GROUP BY oi.category, o.order_id, ot.order_total) SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS orders, ROUND(AVG(order_total), 2) AS avg_order_value, ROUND(MAX(order_total), 2) AS max_order_value FROM cat_orders GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC; -- hard_004

hard.name: hard_005_session_gap_by_user
hard.sql: WITH s AS (SELECT user_id, session_ts, LAG(session_ts) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY session_ts) AS prev_ts FROM sessions) SELECT user_id, session_ts, prev_ts FROM s WHERE prev_ts IS NOT NULL ORDER BY user_id, session_ts; -- hard_005

hard.name: hard_006_top_channel_share
hard.sql: WITH ch AS (SELECT channel, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM conversions c JOIN sessions s ON c.user_id = s.user_id GROUP BY channel), t AS (SELECT SUM(rev) AS total_rev FROM ch) SELECT ch.channel, ROUND(100.0 * ch.rev / NULLIF(t.total_rev, 0), 2) AS revenue_share_pct FROM ch CROSS JOIN t ORDER BY revenue_share_pct DESC; -- hard_006

hard.name: hard_007_multi_step_order_report
hard.sql: WITH order_totals AS (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS order_total FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id), category_rollup AS (SELECT oi.category, o.order_id, ot.order_total, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN order_totals ot ON o.order_id = ot.order_id GROUP BY oi.category, o.order_id, ot.order_total) SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, SUM(qty) AS total_units, ROUND(AVG(order_total), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM category_rollup GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_orders DESC; -- hard_007

hard.name: hard_008_anomaly_ranked_customers
hard.sql: WITH c AS (SELECT customer_id, status, email, age, CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR age < 0 OR LOWER(status) NOT IN ('active','inactive','pending') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_bad FROM customers), r AS (SELECT customer_id, status, is_bad, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY status ORDER BY customer_id) AS rn FROM c WHERE is_bad = 1) SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS bad_rows, MAX(rn) AS max_rank FROM r GROUP BY status ORDER BY bad_rows DESC; -- hard_008

hard.name: hard_009_latest_subscription_per_user
hard.sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT user_id, status, end_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY end_date DESC) AS rn FROM subscriptions) SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS users FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY status ORDER BY users DESC; -- hard_009

fix_broken_query.primary_sql: SELECT product_name, ROUND(SUM(price * quantity), 2) AS total_revenue FROM sales GROUP BY product_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;
hard_variants: WITH p AS (SELECT product_name, ROUND(SUM(price * quantity), 2) AS total_revenue FROM sales GROUP BY product_name) SELECT product_name, total_revenue FROM p ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, product_name ASC LIMIT 5;
SELECT product_name, ROUND(SUM(price * quantity), 2) AS total_revenue FROM sales GROUP BY product_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

inventory_restock_alerts.primary_sql: SELECT product_name, stock_on_hand, reorder_level, (reorder_level - stock_on_hand) AS deficit_units FROM inventory WHERE stock_on_hand <= reorder_level ORDER BY deficit_units DESC, product_name ASC;
hard_variants: SELECT product_name, stock_on_hand, reorder_level, CASE WHEN stock_on_hand <= reorder_level THEN (reorder_level - stock_on_hand) ELSE 0 END AS deficit_units FROM inventory WHERE stock_on_hand <= reorder_level ORDER BY deficit_units DESC;

WITH s AS (SELECT product_name, stock_on_hand, reorder_level, (reorder_level - stock_on_hand) AS deficit_units FROM inventory) SELECT * FROM s WHERE deficit_units >= 0 ORDER BY deficit_units DESC, product_name ASC;

repair_data_pipeline.primary_sql: WITH order_totals AS (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS order_total FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id) SELECT oi.category, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold, ROUND(AVG(ot.order_total), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN order_totals ot ON o.order_id = ot.order_id GROUP BY oi.category ORDER BY total_orders DESC;
hard_variants: WITH order_totals AS (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS order_total FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id), category_orders AS (SELECT oi.category, o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty, ot.order_total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN order_totals ot ON o.order_id = ot.order_id GROUP BY oi.category, o.order_id, ot.order_total) SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, SUM(qty) AS total_units_sold, ROUND(AVG(order_total), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM category_orders GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_orders DESC;

WITH order_totals AS (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS order_total FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id) SELECT oi.category, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold, ROUND(AVG(ot.order_total), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN order_totals ot ON o.order_id = ot.order_id GROUP BY oi.category ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC;

multi_channel_attribution.primary_sql: WITH first_touch AS (SELECT s.user_id, s.channel FROM sessions s JOIN (SELECT user_id, MIN(session_ts) AS first_ts FROM sessions GROUP BY user_id) m ON s.user_id = m.user_id AND s.session_ts = m.first_ts), user_revenue AS (SELECT user_id, ROUND(SUM(revenue), 2) AS total_revenue FROM conversions GROUP BY user_id) SELECT ft.channel, COUNT(ft.user_id) AS users, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(ur.total_revenue, 0)), 2) AS total_revenue FROM first_touch ft LEFT JOIN user_revenue ur ON ft.user_id = ur.user_id GROUP BY ft.channel ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, ft.channel ASC;
hard_variants: WITH ranked_sessions AS (SELECT user_id, channel, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY session_ts) AS rn FROM sessions), user_revenue AS (SELECT user_id, ROUND(SUM(revenue), 2) AS total_revenue FROM conversions GROUP BY user_id) SELECT rs.channel, COUNT(*) AS users, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(ur.total_revenue, 0)), 2) AS total_revenue FROM ranked_sessions rs LEFT JOIN user_revenue ur ON rs.user_id = ur.user_id WHERE rs.rn = 1 GROUP BY rs.channel ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, rs.channel ASC;

WITH first_touch AS (SELECT s.user_id, s.channel FROM sessions s JOIN (SELECT user_id, MIN(session_ts) AS first_ts FROM sessions GROUP BY user_id) m ON s.user_id = m.user_id AND s.session_ts = m.first_ts), user_revenue AS (SELECT user_id, ROUND(SUM(revenue), 2) AS total_revenue FROM conversions GROUP BY user_id) SELECT ft.channel, COUNT(ft.user_id) AS users, ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(ur.total_revenue, 0)), 2) AS total_revenue FROM first_touch ft LEFT JOIN user_revenue ur ON ft.user_id = ur.user_id GROUP BY ft.channel ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
